overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city plaza. The player character traverses neon-lit streets, ascends a grand illuminated staircase, and observes a massive holographic koi fish floating above the skyline before descending to a lower plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial plaza with wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked plaza toward a grand staircase, passing various pedestrians and neon shop signs

notable_agents.action: woman in white jacket walking past the camera

entered.detail: reflective wet tiled ground showing neon reflections
red neon sign with 'GIRLE' text on building facade
tall buildings with illuminated windows and vertical neon advertisements
rectangular concrete planters with small vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet, neon-lit plaza at night. The camera moves forward through reflective paved tiles, passing a woman in white on the left and approaching a grand staircase in the distance. Various pedestrians with umbrellas populate the scene, and the 'GIRLE' shop sign glows prominently on the left.

events.description: begins ascending the wide staircase from the plaza level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide staircase illuminated by blue neon strips, passing pedestrians ascending and descending

notable_agents.action: person with glowing green umbrella descending the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with integrated blue neon strip lighting on edges
curved concrete overpass with blue neon trim underneath
massive blue glowing holographic fish floating in the sky above the city

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a grand staircase bathed in blue neon light, moving under a curved overpass structure. At the top of the stairs, a massive holographic koi fish becomes visible floating in the night sky above the cityscape. Pedestrians move up and down the stairs, including one with a distinctive glowing green umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper promenade with holographic fish display

events.description: turns right to follow the upper promenade pathway
camera tilts upward to view the towering skyscrapers and holographic fish overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper promenade, observing the holographic fish and surrounding corporate neon signage

notable_agents.action: person with red glowing umbrella walking alongside the railing

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate logo on building facade
illuminated signage for Kang Tao corporation on skyscraper
metal safety railing along the elevated walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the camera turns right along the promenade, revealing the massive holographic koi fish swimming overhead. The Petrochem and Kang Tao corporate signs glow in the distance among the skyscrapers. The camera tilts up to admire the scale of the buildings and the floating hologram before approaching the next set of stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower covered plaza with illuminated water features

events.description: descends stairs into the lower covered plaza with blue illuminated pools

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into a lower plaza featuring blue illuminated water pools, then continuing through the covered walkway

entered.detail: staircase leading down to the lower plaza level
rectangular water features with bright cyan underwater lighting
covered walkway with overhead lighting and concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into a lower covered plaza, leaving the holographic fish behind. The area features striking blue illuminated pools and concrete architecture. The scene becomes more enclosed as the camera moves through the underpass corridor, with fewer pedestrians visible in this sheltered space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic plaza that ascends toward a holographic spectacle before descending into a sheltered urban underpass. It begins by moving across reflective paved tiles beneath the glow of a GIRLE shop sign, passing pedestrians with umbrellas as it approaches a grand staircase. As the camera climbs the blue neon-lit stairs and passes under a curved overpass, the view opens up to reveal a massive holographic koi fish floating above the cityscape. The scene then shifts along an upper promenade, tilting upward to capture the scale of the floating fish and distant corporate signs for Petrochem and Kang Tao before turning toward another descent. Finally, the camera moves down into a lower covered plaza, leaving the open skyline behind to enter an enclosed corridor characterized by concrete architecture and striking blue illuminated pools.
